svg.title: Tonomura Buildup — One Electron at a Time, Pattern Emerges
svg.desc: Four detector panels showing electrons accumulating one by one. N=100: random-looking dots. N=3,000: emerging vertical clustering. N=20,000: bright bands clear. N=70,000: sharp interference fringes. Each electron lands as a point — the pattern is wave statistics.
svg.text: Tonomura 1989 — Single Electrons Build a Wave
Each electron is a point. The pattern is statistical. Wave-particle duality, in one experiment.
"The wave is the probability of finding the particle" — Born's rule, made visible.
